test_summary: Local contract deploy path verified with `uv run scripts/deploy_insurance_manager.py local-test`. Live Base Sepolia policy state verified onchain and advanced to `PayoutPaid` for the named policy. Circle x402 payment submission succeeded against the live x402 Echo merchant on Base Sepolia, and the merchant refunded the test payment.
logs: uv run scripts/deploy_insurance_manager.py local-test -> contract deployed locally at 0xf4c78D5953410EC1615501652f93727f7f5A709e
circle wallet list --type agent --chain BASE -> agent wallet 0x9084a185b4c870321f261d12efb2305f8e3d4504
circle services pay https://emc2ai.io/x402/bitquery/bagcheck/raw -> payment submitted, facilitator rejected payload with HTTP 402 invalid_request
circle services pay https://emc2ai.io/x402/bitquery/arbitragescanner -> payment submitted, facilitator rejected payload with HTTP 402 invalid_request
onchain policy state for coverpilot-live-policy-001 -> status 5 (PayoutPaid)

circle wallet transfer 0x3cf96b11e9352d9653255d4f4fbd462db5a97d56 --amount 0 --address 0x3cf96b11e9352d9653255d4f4fbd462db5a97d56 --chain BASE-SEPOLIA -> wallet deployed onchain, txHash 0x45ce62c5035cb9d3bb730f51c1d435698ae21e1a8c3d5acd7ee31acaa28e1251

circle services pay https://x402.payai.network/api/base-sepolia/paid-content --address 0x3cf96b11e9352d9653255d4f4fbd462db5a97d56 --chain BASE-SEPOLIA -> success=true, transaction 0x23f359f2ba32e8a3cf55fbbc959e3692733a728fe3ebf6b05d22d3c1e84007e5, refund 0xc71db85f3099bc36d5eda79cc82ebd061b8565f75862cf01a74f934b78e56fe2
notes: The live Base Sepolia contract now reports policy status 5 (PayoutPaid) for coverpilot-live-policy-001.
The Circle CLI x402 attempts produced signed payment records, but the facilitator returned HTTP 402 invalid_request before a successful paid response was observed.
The persistent reminder to commit everything after ultragoal completion remains in .omx/notepad.md.
